title: Playground Action Finder
concept: A command/search overlay with grouped beginner action cards and a results pane, designed for core contributors who need clear PR review starts, safe save/reset messaging, and quick discovery of the full Playground toolset.
focus: Command/search overlay plus selected-action results pane instead of a traditional modal launcher
Beginner-readable grouped action cards with destructive behavior called out at the point of action
Warm editorial accents used around dense controls without turning the first viewport into a marketing page
flows: Search or select action cards for WordPress PR review, Gutenberg PR or branch review, vanilla WordPress, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, saved sites, save, Site Manager, and export
Save an unsaved Playground to browser storage or a local directory while showing file-copy progress
Manage unsaved and saved Playgrounds, including opening, renaming, and deleting saved browser-backed sites
Use Site Manager tabs for settings, file browser, blueprint JSON, database tools, logs, and export/import actions
Browse featured Blueprint shortcuts and the full Blueprint gallery with category filters
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub with account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
edit WordPress, PHP, language, network, older versions, and multisite settings
understand destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
file browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs
